Belladonna Entertainment

The Rook Rewards Vault

Not everyone gets access.
You earned yours.

How It Works

01

Collect 10 stamps at Belladonna events

02

Get your host sign-off on the back of your card

03

Choose your reward from the vault below

04

Submit your card photo and claim it

Want More Than One?

These rewards are earned one stamp card at a time — but if you can't wait,
everything in the Vault is available for purchase in our online shop.

Visit the Belladonna Shop →

Ready to Claim?

Rook will review your submission personally.
He takes this more seriously than seems necessary.

You Need

A completed 10-stamp loyalty card with host sign-off on the back

Sign-Off Includes

Your name, venue, date, and host signature — written by the host, not you

Delivery

Allow 7–10 days after your submission is approved

One Per Card

Each completed card earns one reward. No duplicates. Rook is watching.

Claim Your Reward →

🐦 Questions? Reach us at belladonnaaudioalchemies@gmail.com

Belladonna Audio Alchemies

Rewards earned at live events. Rook is watching. He respects your commitment.
